name: Spiced Nuts
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Pecan halves, walnut halves; or cashews
recipeInstructions:
1. In a deep, 2-quart heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole dish (or a 2-quart Pyrex mixing bowl), combine the first seven ingredients.
2. Heat uncovered in the microwave for 1 1/2 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Add 1/2 cup nuts at a time to the syrup mixture and stir until well coated.
4. Using a slotted spoon, lift out the nuts and drain any excess syrup. Place the nuts in a shallow, 1 1/2-quart heat-resistant baking dish (such as Corning Ware).
5. Repeat with the remaining nuts.
6. Heat the coated nuts uncovered for an additional 5 minutes or until the syrup begins to harden slightly.
7. Transfer the nuts to wax paper and allow them to cool and harden completely.
This family favorite is easy to make, and I always use pecans. For years, I have filled small containers with these spiced nuts and given them as gifts.
